GAP-1_backtest_replay_governance.detail: 04 law chapter 21 section 1 (articles 83-85): TradingView/Pine limited to L0 draft; Python backtest/event replay/decision trace/order-fill-pnl schema/Risk Gate veto replay all required; TradingView-only forbidden.

GAP-2_market_reality_layer.detail: 04 law chapter 21 section 2 (articles 86-87): cost model, slippage model, liquidity veto, fill realism, broker/local reconciliation, expected vs actual drift, no-trade when infeasible.

GAP-3_taiwan_market_constraints.detail: 04 law chapter 21 section 3 (article 88): ±10%, T+2, call auctions, trading hours, odd/lot shares, halts, disposal stocks, no crypto/US assumptions.

GAP-4_l0_l9_trading_validation_ladder.detail: 04 law chapter 21 section 4 (articles 89-90): L0 Backtest through L9 Paper trading 6-12mo fully defined; backtest alone insufficient; L4+L8 required before paper; L7+L9 required before live; formal acceptance records specified.

GAP-5_strategy_lifecycle_governance.detail: 04 law chapter 21 section 5 (articles 91-94): research_only default; auto-promote only to shadow/paper; paper-to-live requires human approval; rolling health check, TTL, regime validity, decay detection, promotion expiry, revalidation; auto downgrade allowed, auto upgrade forbidden.

GAP-6_position_sizing_allocation_trace.detail: 04 law chapter 21 section 6 (articles 95-97): deterministic qty=min() formula; LLM cannot control qty; allocation trace required; 10 exposure caps defined; strategy cannot self-fund; risk gate veto.

GAP-7_nea_governance.detail: 04 law chapter 21 section 7 (articles 98-100): 7 release conditions; net_edge formula with all terms (C,S,B,T,R,U); p_hat must be calibrated; single signal cannot directly trade.

GAP-8_confidence_calibration.detail: 04 law chapter 21 section 8 (articles 101-102): raw confidence cannot release trade; calibration required; 6 minimum calibration records.

GAP-9_setup_sop_single_signal.detail: 04 law chapter 21 section 9 (articles 103-104): 10-field mandatory setup structure; A/B/C score label only; NO TRADE = hard veto; FRVP/ICT/etc data-availability-gated; Python/event-driven replay required, not TradingView-only.

GAP-10_event_credibility_llm_governance.detail: 04 law chapter 21 section 10 (articles 105-109): 8 event source categories; 5-tier credibility ranking; dedup/stale/ttl/importance/conflict resolution; high-impact unconfirmed = watch/no-trade/reduce/wait/tighten; 6-AI = local modules; LLM API only for summary/research; LLM timeout cannot lower risk.

GAP-11_r030_applicability.detail: 04 law chapter 21 section 11 (articles 110-111): R030 must reference all chapter 21 rules; 11 mandatory checkpoints listed; failure to reference = FAIL; R030 not dispatched in this candidate.
